acceptance_criteria.text: Implement Sprint 21-25 Operator Inbox, paid generation registry exposure, Telegram parity and manual publish tracking without external writes.
proof: Operator Inbox API and service added.
Web Operator UI exposes inbox copy/open/mark actions.
Telegram manual review path uses same backend service and states manual publication boundary.
gaps: Real Apify execution and actual-cost settlement remain disabled/planned.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_inbox.py tests/test_operator_manual_publish.py tests/test_operator_manual_review.py tests/test_operator_paid_preflight.py tests/test_operator_credit_reservation.py tests/test_operator_paid_actions.py tests/test_operator_paid_executor.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py tests/test_operator_audit.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py tests/test_telegram_response_router.py
known_gaps: Real external map refresh through Apify is not enabled by default.
Direct publishing to maps is still manual copy/paste.
